title: NPC Autopilot
description: Foundry VTT NPC combat autopilot for D&D 5e. v3.9.6: fix LOS (use token center coords + polygonBackends.sight.testCollision), fix pathfinding (perpendicular sweeps, 48 candidate waypoints), fix _findSafePosition wall-side fallback. v3.9.0: NPC Vision, doors, pathfinding.
